business.name: Study Sphere
business.oneLiner: Bite-size revision for competitive exams. GS, Polity, Science and English, broken down so it finally sticks.
business.about: Study Sphere turns a heavy syllabus into quick, punchy revision you can actually finish between classes. Built for competitive-exam aspirants who are done with 12-hour lectures, we post daily cards that cut GS, Polity, Science and English down to just the high-yield stuff that shows up in the paper.

services.title: General Studies
services.blurb: History, geography, economy and current affairs, condensed into quick daily cards.

services.title: Polity
services.blurb: The Constitution, Parliament and governance, mapped so the concepts finally click.

services.title: Science
services.blurb: Physics, chemistry and biology basics, plus the science-and-tech news examiners love.

services.title: English
services.blurb: Grammar, vocabulary and comprehension drills to lock down the easy marks.
